column28: Part of Donald E. Crabtree's experiments with heat treating stone. Ce.7940 is a fragment of Ce.7939. This specific experiment had the stone heat treated from 8:00am to 3:00pm in electric furnace peaking at 1700 degrees F. The object is a percussion flake and is associated with Ce.7892-Ce.7939.
